1.title: A Threat Within
1.description: Marshal McBride has asked you to report to Deputy Willem.

2.title: Kobold Camp Cleanup
2.description: Kill 10 Kobold Vermin and return to Marshal McBride.

3.title: Rest and Relaxation
3.description: Speak to the innkeeper to rest.

4.title: Wolves Across the Border
4.description: Kill 8 Young Forest Wolves near the Valley of Trials.

5.title: Encrypted Tablet
5.description: Recover the Encrypted Tablet from the Defias camp and bring it to Scholar Fannet.
